summary: Tested iteration 53 features: 4 sub-tabs in AchatsTab (Validation en cours, À réviser, Achats validés, Rejetés), notification badge auto-clamp, double-click protection on submit. All features verified working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' and '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React wrapper elements causing hydration errors

action_items: Minor: Fix React hydration warnings for select/table elements (span wrappers around options/rows)
critical_code_review_comments: Sub-tabs correctly implemented with data-testid attributes: achats-subtab-en-cours, achats-subtab-a-reviser, achats-subtab-valides, achats-subtab-rejetes
Badge auto-clamp logic in useNotifications.js correctly clamps ack to curr when ack > curr
Double-click protection implemented with expenseSubmitLoading state, disabled button, and 'Envoi en cours...' text
Filtering logic correctly shows: pending in 'Validation en cours', revision_requested in 'À réviser', approved+completed in 'Achats validés', rejected in 'Rejetés'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 added 4 sub-tabs to AchatsTab: 'Validation en cours' (renamed from 'En cours'), 'À réviser' (NEW - amber), 'Achats validés' (green), 'Rejetés' (NEW - rose). Badge auto-clamp feature ensures notification badges show correctly when items are processed. Double-click protection on expense submit button prevents duplicate submissions.

frontend: 4 sub-tabs in AchatsTab with correct data-testid attributes
Sub-tab 'Validation en cours' (purple) shows status='pending' expenses
Sub-tab 'À réviser' (amber) shows status='revision_requested' expenses - both manager 'À RÉVISER' card and admin 'MODIFIÉS — EN COURS DE RÉVISION' card
Sub-tab 'Achats validés' (green) shows status='approved' and status='completed' expenses
Sub-tab 'Rejetés' (rose) shows status='rejected' expenses with empty state when none exist
Badge counts on each sub-tab showing correct counts
Notification badge auto-clamp: when raw count decreases, ack is clamped to prevent hidden badges
Double-click protection: expenseSubmitLoading state, disabled button during submit, 'Envoi en cours...' text
Admin can see 'Approuver' and 'Nouvelle révision' buttons on revision items
Cross-role notification banner working (Admin sees 'Nouvelle(s) information(s) de la Gérante')

test_scenarios_executed: Verify 4 sub-tabs visible with correct colors and badges - SUCCESS
Click each sub-tab and verify content filtering - SUCCESS
Verify admin view of Achats tab with all 4 sub-tabs - SUCCESS
Verify admin revision card in 'À réviser' tab - SUCCESS
Verify 'Rejetés' tab shows empty state - SUCCESS
Code review: double-click protection implementation - VERIFIED
Code review: badge auto-clamp implementation - VERIFIED
